category_sources: source_facts.description identifies juise as a JUNOS user interface scripting environment; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub wiki for the Juniper project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is juise; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo use Juniper/juise.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Juniper GitHub wiki, which is the best official documentation surface supplied for this project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Juniper/juise, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies JUNOS scripting; source_facts.executables lists juise and juise-config CLI commands.
